items.raw_excerpt: Now that summer is here, locals and visitors are eager to enjoy a refreshing dip in Norway’s beautiful fjords, lakes, and coastal waters. Still, as any seasoned swimmer in Norway knows, the water is not always quite as warm (or safe) as expected.
items.summary_en: Summer has arrived in Norway. Locals and visitors want to swim in fjords, lakes, and coastal waters. But the water is not always warm or safe.
items.summary_ko: 노르웨이에 여름이 찾아왔다. 현지인과 방문객 모두 피오르와 호수, 해안에서 수영을 즐기고 싶어 한다. 하지만 물이 항상 따뜻하거나 안전한 것은 아니다.
items.title_en: Wild swimming in Norway: what you need to know
items.title_ko: 노르웨이에서 자연 속 수영하기 전 알아야 할 것들
items.title_original: What you need to know about wild swimming in Norway before you dive in

items.raw_excerpt: Passengers flying from Vienna Airport can now leave laptops, phones and liquids in their hand luggage at security, as new CT scanners are introduced across all terminals.
items.summary_en: Vienna Airport now uses CT scanners at all security checkpoints. Travelers can leave laptops, phones, and liquids in their hand luggage. The new rules allow bottles up to 2 liters.
items.summary_ko: 비엔나 공항이 모든 보안 검색대에 CT 스캐너를 도입했다. 승객은 노트북, 휴대폰, 액체류를 손에 든 가방에 넣은 채로 통과할 수 있다. 최대 2리터 용기까지 반입이 가능해졌다.
items.title_en: Vienna Airport lets passengers keep laptops and liquids in bags at security
items.title_ko: 비엔나 공항, 노트북·액체류 가방에 넌 채로 보안통과 허용
items.title_original: 2L bottles, laptops: Vienna Airport announces new security rules

items.raw_excerpt: Work to restore the façade of the former royal palace of Soestdijk will take up to five years to complete after years of neglect, the lead contractor on the project has said. Flip van de Burgt said the building had been maintained “at a minimum level” in the 22 years since it ceased to be used as a residential palace. Wooden staircases and window frames have rotted away, plasterwork is riddled with cracks and mould and the zinc gutters are...
items.summary_en: The facade restoration of Soestdijk Palace will take up to five years after long neglect. The building was maintained at a minimum level for 22 years after it stopped being a royal residence. Wooden staircases and window frames have rotted, and plasterwork is cracked and moldy.
items.summary_ko: 소스트데이크 궁전 정면 복원 작업이 최대 5년이 걸릴 전망이다. 왕실 거주지 역할을 끝낸 지 22년 동안 최소한의 유지만 이뤄져 목재 계단과 창틀이 썩고 회반죽에 금이 가고 곰팡이가 슬었다.
items.title_en: Restoration of neglected Dutch royal palace will take five years
items.title_ko: 방치된 네덜란드 왕궁 복원에 5년 소요
items.title_original: Restoration of neglected Dutch royal palace will take five years

items.raw_excerpt: The first day of traffic diversions at Hyderabad's IIIT Junction due to flyover and underpass construction increased travel times and congestion for over 10,000 IT employees commuting to the Gachibowli IT corridor.
items.summary_en: Day one of traffic changes at Hyderabad's IIIT Junction caused major delays. Over 10,000 IT workers had to take longer routes to reach Gachibowli. The diversions are for new flyover and underpass construction.
items.summary_ko: 하이데라바드 IIIT 교차로에서 고가도로와 지하차도 공사로 인한 교통 우회 첫날, 1만 명이 넘는 IT 직원들이 더 먼 길로 출근해야 했다. 가치볼리 IT 지역으로 가는 출근길 곳곳에서 큰 혼잡이 빚어졌다.
items.title_en: IIIT Junction diversions cause congestion for 10,000 Hyderabad IT employees
items.title_ko: 하이데라바드 IIIT 교차로 교통 우회로 IT 직원 1만 명 이상 큰 혼란
items.title_original: Day 1 of IIIT junction diversions forces over 10,000 IT employees onto longer routes, triggers congestion

items.raw_excerpt: Realizar o sonho de casar gratuitamente no estado é possível por meio da ação promovida pela Defensoria Pública do Estado de Pernambuco (DPE), no dia 28 de
items.summary_en: The Public Defender's Office of Pernambuco is offering free collective weddings. Couples can sign up to get married at no cost on July 28 in Recife.
items.summary_ko: 페르남부쿠 주 공공변호인단이 레시페에서 무료 합동 결혼식을 연다. 예비 부부들은 7월 28일 비용 부담 없이 결혼할 수 있도록 신청할 수 있다.
items.title_en: Free collective wedding registration opens in Recife
items.title_ko: 브라질 레시페에서 무료 합동 결혼식 신청 접수 시작
items.title_original: Defensoria Pública de Pernambuco abre inscrições para casamento coletivo no Recife - CBN Recife

items.raw_excerpt: A new generation of producers is bringing Argentina's historic grapes back into the spotlight, pairing centuries-old vineyards with fresh, contemporary winemaking
items.summary_en: A new generation of winemakers in Argentina is bringing back historic Criolla grapes. They combine old vineyards with modern winemaking methods. These grapes had been forgotten for many years.
items.summary_ko: 아르헨티나의 새로운 세대 양조업자들이 역사적인 크리올라 포도를 다시 살리고 있다. 오래된 포도밭을 현대적인 양조 기술과 결합해 예전에 잊혔던 품종을 부활시키는 중이다.
items.title_en: Argentina's old wine grapes are popular again
items.title_ko: 아르헨티나 토종 포도 품종이 다시 주목받다
items.title_original: The renaissance of the Criolla grape family

items.raw_excerpt: With World Cup hosting duties over, Guadalajara turns its attention to an exciting art exhibition featuring Frida Kahlo and Diego Rivera.
items.summary_en: Guadalajara has wrapped up its duties as a World Cup host city. The city is now turning its attention to an art exhibition featuring Frida Kahlo and Diego Rivera.
items.summary_ko: 과달라하라가 월드컵 개최 도시 임무를 마쳤습니다. 이제 이 도시는 프리다 칼로와 디에고 리베라 작품을 선보이는 흥미로운 예술 전시회에 집중하고 있습니다.
items.title_en: Guadalajara finishes World Cup hosting, looks forward to art exhibition
items.title_ko: 과달라하라, 월드컵 개최 마무리하고 프리다 칼로·디에고 리베라 전시회 준비
items.title_original: MND Local: Guadalajara wraps up World Cup hosting duties, but continues exciting art exhibition

items.raw_excerpt: On Wednesday, as the ‘Safe Footpath’ campaign was launched, a group of people got a taste of Bengaluru’s footpaths. Unknown to the civic administration, a run had been organised for a delegation from the Norwegian Embassy along a six-kilometre stretch of footpaths winding through a scenic part of the Garden City.
items.summary_en: A six-kilometer run was organized for a Norwegian Embassy group along Bengaluru footpaths. The event launched the 'Safe Footpath' campaign. The city administration did not know about the run beforehand.
items.summary_ko: 벵갈루루 '안전한 보도' 캠페인 출범식에서 노르웨이 대사관 대표단을 위한 6km 구간 보도 러닝 행사가 열렸다. '정원의 도시' 벵갈루루의 경치 좋은 길을 따라 진행된 이 러닝을 시 당국은 사전에 인지하지 못했다.
items.title_en: Safe footpath campaign in Bengaluru gets unexpected Norwegian push
items.title_ko: 벵갈루루 '안전한 보도' 캠페인, 노르웨이 대사관 대표단도 함께 뛰었다
items.title_original: Safe footpath campaign in Bengaluru receives an unexpected Norwegian push

items.raw_excerpt: The Jayadeva Institute of Cardiovascular Sciences and Research, Mysuru, has successfully performed the Unicorn procedure on a 73-year-old cardiac patient.
items.summary_en: A hospital in Mysuru, India successfully used the Unicorn procedure on a 73-year-old heart patient. The Jayadeva Institute of Cardiovascular Sciences performed this treatment. The patient is recovering well.
items.summary_ko: 인도 마이수르의 자야데바 심혈관 연구소가 73세 심장 환자에게 '유니콘' 시술을 성공적으로 집도했다. 이 시술은 기존 방식과 다른 새로운 심장 수술 기법이다. 환자는 회복 중이다.
items.title_en: Hospital in Mysuru performs 'Unicorn' procedure on 73-year-old heart patient
items.title_ko: 마이수르 병원, 73세 심장 환자에 '유니콘' 시술 성공
items.title_original: Unicorn procedure successfully performed on cardiac patient at Jayadeva hospital in Mysuru

items.raw_excerpt: For Australians on the brink of homelessness, dilapidated boats have become a way to stave off sleeping on the streets, but many are being removed from these vessels amid a safety crackdown.
items.summary_en: Some Australians facing homelessness are living in broken boats to avoid sleeping on the streets. Officials are now removing many of these boats as part of a safety crackdown. Residents are fighting back against the removals.
items.summary_ko: 노숙 위기에 처한 일부 호주인들은 길바닥에서 자는 것을 피하기 위해 낡은 보트에서 살고 있다. 당국이 안전 단속의 일환으로 이 보트들을 철거하면서 주민들은 반발하고 있다.
items.title_en: 'Have to get me off at gunpoint': Homeless Australians living on boats to avoid the streets
items.title_ko: 총으로 끌어내야 할 걸': 노숙 위기 호주인들이 보트에서 사는 이유
items.title_original: 'Have to get me off at gunpoint': The fight for people's right to live on boats

items.raw_excerpt: Flinders circumnavigated and named Australia. Impressive stuff, but he also wrote many impassioned letters and lived a life full of crushes.
items.summary_en: Matthew Flinders is famous for circumnavigating and naming Australia. But he also wrote many passionate letters and lived a life full of crushes.
items.summary_ko: 매슈 플린더스는 오스트레일리아를 일주하고 이름을 붙인 탐험가로 유명하다. 하지만 그는 수많은 열정적인 편지를 썼고, 짝사랑으로 가득한 삶을 살았다.
items.title_en: What Matthew Flinders and George Bass can teach us about male friendship
items.title_ko: 매슈 플린더스와 조지 배스가 알려주는 남성 우정
items.title_original: What Matthew Flinders and George Bass can teach us about male friendship

items.raw_excerpt: VANCOUVER, July 1 : As fans descend on Vancouver's BC Place for World Cup matches, TSS Rovers, a supporter-owned semi-professional club from nearby Richmond, offer a reminder that Canada's soccer rise has been driven not only by elite investment but also by grassroots ambition.Founded in 2017 out of the TSS A
items.summary_en: TSS Rovers is a supporter-owned semi-professional club from Richmond, near Vancouver. The team shows that Canada's soccer rise is also driven by local fans and grassroots ambition, not just big investments. The club was founded in 2017.
items.summary_ko: TSS Rovers는 밴쿠버 근교 리치먼드에 연고를 둔 서포터 소유의 세미프로 클럽이다. 이 팀은 캐나다 축구의 성장이 대규모 투자뿐 아니라 지역 팬과 풀뿌리 열정에 의해서도 이뤄지고 있음을 보여준다. 2017년 창단했다.
items.title_en: Fan-owned club in Canada shows grassroots side of soccer growth
items.title_ko: 캐나다 축구 성장의 숨은 주역, 서포터가 운영하는 지역 클럽
items.title_original: At a fan-owned club, a 'band of optimists' reflects Canada's soccer moment

items.raw_excerpt: On Vanuatu's Tanna Island, I immerse myself in a culture that worships a shape-shifting spirit known as John Frum.
items.summary_en: On Vanuatu's Tanna Island, locals worship a shape-shifting spirit called John Frum. The religion was inspired by US soldiers during World War II. A visitor explores this unique culture.
items.summary_ko: 바누아투 태나 섬 주민들은 '존 프럼'이라는 변신하는 정령을 숭배한다. 이 종교는 제2차 세계대전 당시 미군 병사들에서 비롯되었다. 한 방문객이 이 독특한 문화를 탐험한다.
items.title_en: How US soldiers helped inspire a religion on a remote island in Vanuatu
items.title_ko: 바누아투 외딴 섬의 종교를 탄생시킨 미군 병사들
items.title_original: How US soldiers helped inspire a religion on a remote island in Vanuatu

items.raw_excerpt: Albertans can start applying today for $100 that the provincial government says is intended to help deal with the high cost of living.
items.summary_en: Albertans can now apply for $100 from the provincial government. The payments help with the high cost of living.
items.summary_ko: 앨버타 주정부가 생활비 부담 완화를 위해 주민당 $100씩 지급하는 지원금 신청이 오늘부터 시작됐다. 고물가로 어려움을 겪는 주민들을 위한 조치다.
items.title_en: $100 affordability payments open for Albertans
items.title_ko: 앨버타 주민, $100 생활비 지원금 신청 개시
items.title_original: Application portal opens for $100 affordability payments for Albertans

items.raw_excerpt: A new book launched in Chennai explores friendship and well-being among youth in the AI era, highlighting loneliness and emotional connections.
items.summary_en: A new book about friendship and well-being for young people in the AI age was launched in Chennai. It talks about growing loneliness and the need for emotional connections in a tech-driven world.
items.summary_ko: AI 시대 청년들의 우정과 웰빙에 관한 신간이 첸나이에서 출간됐다. 이 책은 기술 중심 세상에서 커져가는 외로움과 정서적 연결의 필요성을 이야기한다.
items.title_en: Book on friendships in the AI age launched in Chennai
items.title_ko: AI 시대 친구 관계와 웰빙 조명한 책, 첸나이서 출간
items.title_original: Book on friendships amid AI era launched in Chennai

items.raw_excerpt: Women are taking up golf nearly twice as fast as men, with junior golfers like Rianna Hills one of many young people giving the sport a huge participation boost.
items.summary_en: Women are taking up golf nearly twice as fast as men. Junior golfers like 8-year-old Rianna Hills are giving the sport a huge participation boost.
items.summary_ko: 여성들의 골프 참여율이 남성보다 거의 두 배 빠르게 증가하고 있습니다. 8세 리아나 힐스 같은 주니어 골퍼들이 이 스포츠의 참여율을 크게 끌어올리고 있습니다.
items.title_en: An 8-year-old girl is helping boost golf numbers among women and girls
items.title_ko: 8세 소녀가 골프 인기 견인... 여성 골퍼 증가세 두드러져
items.title_original: This 8yo is one of many girls and young women driving golf numbers up

items.raw_excerpt: A NSW Police officer has admitted to unlawfully accessing the force's internal database to locate details about a domestic violence complaint against his friend.
items.summary_en: A NSW Police sergeant secretly looked up the force's internal database to find details about a domestic violence complaint against his friend. He has admitted to the unlawful access.
items.summary_ko: NSW 경찰 경사가 가정폭력 고소를 당한 친구를 위해 경찰 내부 데이터베이스에 불법 접속한 사실을 시인했다. 그는 경찰 전산망에 몰래 접속해 관련 정보를 찾아본 혐의를 받는다.
items.title_en: Police sergeant illegally accessed database for friend accused of domestic violence
items.title_ko: 경찰 경사, 가정폭력 고소당한 친구 위해 내부 데이터베이스 불법 조회
items.title_original: 'Snuck a look': Police sergeant accessed database for DV-accused mate

items.raw_excerpt: Ale García of Ciudad Victoria had been missing her pet for nearly a month when her lost dog was found at a World Cup victory celebration.
items.summary_en: A woman from Ciudad Victoria found her lost dog after nearly a month. The dog was spotted on a live stream celebrating Mexico's World Cup victory. The owner saw the broadcast and reunited with her pet.
items.summary_ko: 시우다드 빅토리아에 사는 알레 가르시아는 한 달 가까이 실종된 반려견을 찾고 있었습니다. 그런데 월드컵 승리 응원 현장 중계에 강아지가 등장했고, 주인이 생중계를 보고 달려가 재회했습니다.
items.title_en: Lost dog found celebrating Mexico's World Cup win
items.title_ko: 실종된 반려견, 월드컵 응원 중계에 등장해 주인과 재회
items.title_original: Lost dog reunited after live stream shows it celebrating Mexico’s win

items.raw_excerpt: Faced with customers who owe money, shrinking sales and a looming lease deadline, Joey Low refuses to let her father’s roast meat business fold. On The Red Dot finds out what it takes to sustain a legacy under strain.
items.summary_en: Joey Low quit her six-figure job to rescue her father's failing roast meat business in Singapore. She discovered $500,000 in unpaid debts and shrinking sales. Now she fights to keep the family legacy alive.
items.summary_ko: 싱가포르에서 조이 로는 연봉 6자리 직장을 그만두고 아버지의 roast meat 가게를 살리기로 했다. 매출은 줄고 50만 달러의 악성 채무가 쌓여 있었지만, 그녀는 가업을 지키기 위해 싸우고 있다.
items.title_en: She left a high-paying job to save her father's roast meat shop and found $500,000 in bad debt
items.title_ko: 연봉 6자리 포기하고 아버지 roast meat 가게 지킨 딸, 50만 달러 빚 발견
items.title_original: She ditched a six-figure salary to save her dad’s business, and uncovered S$500,000 in bad debt

items.raw_excerpt: Naomi Osaka of Japan warms up before her second round women's singles match against Anastasia Gasanova of Russia at the Wimbledon Tennis Championships in London on Wednesday. Osaka won 6-3, 6-2.
items.summary_en: Naomi Osaka wore a fashionable outfit for her warm-up before winning her Wimbledon match. She beat Anastasia Gasanova 6-3, 6-2.
items.summary_ko: 나오미 오사카가 윔블던 경기 전 화려한 패션으로 워밍업해 눈길을 끌었다. 그녀는 아나스타샤 가사노바를 6-3, 6-2로 꺾고 2회전에 진출했다.
items.title_en: Osaka warms up in style at Wimbledon
items.title_ko: 윔블던에서 오사카의 패션 워밍업
items.title_original: Osaka fashion show
